warnings: Feedback items derive from a single seeded case. Frequency and conversion rates remain unknown.
All candidates are proposed only. EVL/TPA/CDE/SEL/GOV ownership is unchanged; no eval, policy, control, or enforcement adoption occurs in this PR.
closure_required_by dates are recommendations, not deadlines. MET does not gate closure.
failure_prevented: Failures and near misses going unobserved into the next loop with no eval candidate or policy candidate signal raised; promotion gates re-encountering the same blocker without an improvement input on file.
signal_improved: Traceable link from each named failure mode, near miss, and leverage item to a proposed eval candidate or policy candidate signal, including age and closure pressure visibility.

feedback_items.failure_prevented: Promotion gated on partial evaluation evidence with no eval candidate logged for the missing dimensions.
feedback_items.signal_improved: Long-horizon replay and full certification set coverage become traceable as proposed eval candidates instead of unspoken gaps.

feedback_items.failure_prevented: Observe-only enforcement re-occurring on the next loop with no policy candidate signal documenting the certification-set gap.
feedback_items.signal_improved: Certification completeness gap is captured as a policy candidate signal addressed to SEL/GOV before any further promotion attempt.

feedback_items.failure_prevented: Long-horizon drift slipping through without a replay-coverage eval candidate ever being raised.
feedback_items.signal_improved: REP coverage gap becomes a proposed eval candidate visible to EVL upstream of the next promotion attempt.

feedback_items.failure_prevented: Promotion review proceeding without an SLO budget eval candidate covering consumed_ratio and budget_status.
feedback_items.signal_improved: SLO budget context surfaces as a proposed eval candidate alongside CDE inputs.

feedback_items.failure_prevented: Repeat near miss going unrecorded as a policy candidate signal for the warn-gate boundary that caught it.
feedback_items.signal_improved: Near-miss boundary becomes a proposed policy candidate signal addressed to TPA/CDE without MET claiming any policy authority.

feedback_items.failure_prevented: Highest-leverage queue item ageing without a paired eval candidate or policy candidate signal.
feedback_items.signal_improved: EVL coverage-gap leverage item is paired to a proposed eval candidate so the bottleneck has an attack path on file.

feedback_items.failure_prevented: Fallback rows continuing to be reported as if artifact-backed, with no improvement input on file naming the systems and required signals.
feedback_items.signal_improved: Per-system fallback reduction becomes a proposed policy candidate signal naming exact systems and replacement signals.
